title: Shadow & Complxz Vanilla Remix v1
description: this modpack combines the optional fun of vr with the vanilla plus and vanilla friendly parts of modding! this modpack is for newly made modders
body:
**DISCLAMER! I WILL NOT BE ADDING ALL OF THE MODS IN THE CHANGELOG EVERY UPDATE INSTEAD I WILL BE ADDING ONLY THE MODS THAT IVE ADDED IN TO THE NEW VERSION OF THE MODPACK IN THE CHANGELOG AS THE UPDATES ROLL OUT**

all of these mods ive found on modrinth and the vanilla tweaks website which you can go to here: [https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)
i might add vanilla tweaks datapacks in the future but in case i do heres the link to the datapacks section of vanilla tweaks: [https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/datapacks/](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/datapacks/)

this modpack add vr support to basicly vanilla minecraft but with a few performance mods and qol (quality of life) mods and mods that would just be nice to have

since there are too many mods to list in the description without people getting bored of reading you can check what mods are installed in the modpack (every update) in the updates install page under the dependencys section

have fun and dont forget

**"this is just a game"**

**EDIT-> ALL OF THE MODS I USED FOR THE MODPACK ARE NOT ALL UPDATED FOR MINECRAFT VERSIONS ABOVE 1.21.6. WHILE ALL OF THEM ARE UPDATED FOR 1.21.6, NOT ALL ARE UPDATED FOR 1.21.7. IM SORRY IT TOOK THIS LONG (AS OF THIS UPDATE IT IS OCTOBER 23RD 2025) BUT I WAS WAITING FOR ALL OF THE MODS TO GET UPDATED. I DON'T KNOW HOW LONG IT WILL TAKE FOR THE REST OF THE MODS TO GET UPDATED BUT I WILL BE REGULARLY CHECKING WHICH IS SOMETHING I DIDN'T DO FOR THE 1.21.6 UPDATE.**
